title: ctenopsis garcinii
intro: Ctenopsis garcinii, also known as the "Java tea plant", is a species of flowering plant in the genus Ctenopsis. It is a shrub native to Indonesia, traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a stimulant and diuretic. Ctenopsis garcinii contains caffeine, which gives it a similar effect to tea and coffee, and is also rich in antioxidants, offering various health benefits such as improving heart health and reducing inflammation. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, which are often consumed as a beverage or used in traditional medicine.
